questions.section: Q4. Cognitive Style & Locus of Control

items.question: Cognitive Style Analysis (K, P, C values)
What is your Locus of Control test score?
List your technical skills with current proficiency level (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced)
items.placeholder: e.g., Python: Intermediate, MERN Stack: Beginner, SQL: Intermediate

items.question: List your soft/professional skills with current proficiency level
items.placeholder: e.g., Communication: Intermediate, Time Management: Intermediate, Teamwork: Advanced

items.question: Which skills do you most need to improve for your career goals?
items.placeholder: e.g., Advanced Machine Learning, Backend Architecture, Public Speaking

items.question: List your key strengths (personal, academic, and technical)
items.placeholder: e.g., Strong planning skills, detail-oriented, creative thinking, good teamwork

items.question: List your key weaknesses or areas for improvement
items.placeholder: e.g., Perfectionism, limited industry experience, balancing workload

items.question: What opportunities are available to you?
items.placeholder: e.g., High demand for AI skills, university resources, online platforms like Kaggle/GitHub

items.question: What threats or external challenges do you face?
items.placeholder: e.g., Competitive job market, rapid technology changes, risk of burnout

items.question: What are your short-term goals? (next 1–6 months, be specific)
items.placeholder: e.g., Complete MERN+AI project in 2 weeks, build a mobile app in 1.5 months

items.question: What are your medium-term goals? (6 months – 2 years)
items.placeholder: e.g., Complete 2 certifications, participate in 2 hackathons, achieve GPA above 3.85

items.question: What is your long-term vision? (degree completion and beyond)
items.placeholder: e.g., Achieve First-Class honors, become a senior software engineer specializing in AI

items.question: What role or industry are you working toward?
items.placeholder: e.g., Full-stack Developer / AI Engineer

items.question: What progress have you made in the last month?
items.placeholder: e.g., Improved progress in MERN Stack + AI/ML project

items.question: What challenges did you face recently?
items.placeholder: e.g., Balancing academic work with projects and extracurriculars

items.question: What are your priorities for the next month?
items.placeholder: e.g., Follow a structured weekly schedule, allocate dedicated coding time

items.question: Summarize your progress and key learnings this semester
items.placeholder: e.g., Completed major assignments, improved Java and DSA skills

items.question: Summarize your overall yearly growth and next year's focus
items.placeholder: e.g., Year 1 built programming foundation; Year 2 enhanced practical skills through projects

items.question: What motivates you the most in your studies and career?
items.placeholder: e.g., Innovation, solving real-world problems, building impactful technology

items.question: How do you prefer to learn?
items.placeholder: e.g., Hands-on projects, YouTube tutorials, online courses

items.question: What extracurricular activities or clubs are you involved in?
items.placeholder: e.g., IEEE Student Branch, university coding club, tech community volunteering

items.question: What are the biggest challenges you currently face?
items.placeholder: e.g., Time management, keeping up with rapid tech changes, self-doubt

items.question: What support systems do you rely on?
items.placeholder: e.g., University mentors, tech communities, peer study groups, family

items.question: What external factors limit your growth?
items.placeholder: e.g., Limited local mentorship, financial constraints, limited industry exposure
